_readme: Style-extraction A/B. Fixtures are FINISHED TikToks (not raw proxies) — AirDrop them from the phone and fill in truth.json per fixture (see fixtures/style/duo-example/truth.json). Runs on flash-latest for production parity; add gemini-pro-latest to models[] as an optional arm. schemaOn true uses style-schema.json (constrained decoding) — the A/B decides whether it ships.
